CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Feb-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Defendant Barclay's Bank Delaware's unopposed Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiffs are ordered to submit this dispute to arbitration under the Barclay's cardmember agreement. (Beauchamp Decl., exs. G & H.) The record demonstrates the parties entered an arbitration agreement and the agreement appears to cover the disputes at issue.

Notably, Plaintiffs failed to oppose the motion, and the court deems the absence of an opposition as consent to the granting of the motion. (See California Rules of Court, rule 8.54(c).)

Plaintiffs' claims against Barclay's are ordered to arbitration and the matter is stayed pending the outcome of the arbitration proceedings.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
